epa_per_play_z.how: Average EPA on all dropbacks (passes, sacks, scrambles).
epa_per_play_z.limits: Influenced by supporting cast (OL, receivers, scheme).

cpoe_z.what: Completion % Over Expected — accuracy controlling for throw difficulty
cpoe_z.how: Actual completion % minus expected completion % based on throw distance and context.
cpoe_z.limits: The expected model has its own biases.

yards_per_attempt_z.limits: Doesn't account for sacks. Can be inflated by a few big plays.

deep_ball_accuracy_z.what: Completion % on throws with 20+ air yards
deep_ball_accuracy_z.how: Completions / attempts on deep passes. Requires 10+ deep attempts per season.
deep_ball_accuracy_z.limits: Scheme-dependent. Doesn't capture ball placement quality.

int_rate_z.what: Interception avoidance — fewer INTs per attempt = better
int_rate_z.how: INTs / pass attempts. Inverted so positive z = fewer INTs.
int_rate_z.limits: Some INTs aren't the QB's fault. Doesn't capture dropped INTs.

sack_rate_z.what: Sack avoidance — fewer sacks per dropback = better
sack_rate_z.how: Sacks / dropbacks. Inverted so positive z = fewer sacks.

pressure_to_sack_rate_z.what: When pressured, how often does the QB avoid the sack?
pressure_to_sack_rate_z.how: Sacks / (sacks + QB hits). Inverted so positive z = better escape rate.
pressure_to_sack_rate_z.limits: QB hit tracking isn't perfectly consistent.

twp_rate_z.what: Turnover-worthy play rate — INTs + fumbles lost per dropback
twp_rate_z.how: Proxy for PFF's TWP. Inverted so positive z = fewer turnovers.
twp_rate_z.limits: Doesn't capture lucky incompletions. Fumbles include strip sacks.

fourth_q_epa_z.what: EPA per play in 4th quarter and overtime
fourth_q_epa_z.how: Same as EPA/play filtered to Q4+OT. Requires 20+ clutch dropbacks.
fourth_q_epa_z.limits: Smaller sample. Influenced by game script.

third_down_conv_rate_z.how: % of 3rd-down dropbacks resulting in first down or TD.

red_zone_td_rate_z.what: TD rate on plays inside the opponent's 20
red_zone_td_rate_z.how: TDs / dropbacks inside the 20. Requires 10+ red zone dropbacks.
red_zone_td_rate_z.limits: Scheme-dependent. Teams that run in red zone lower this.

rush_epa_per_play_z.what: EPA per rushing play (designed runs + scrambles)
rush_epa_per_play_z.how: Average EPA on QB carries. Requires 10+ rush attempts.
rush_epa_per_play_z.limits: Scramble EPA can be inflated on broken plays.
